briefEffectiveness.status: VALIDATED (zero failures in dispatch + enforcement DAGs)
briefEffectiveness.estimatedTokenSavings: 70-80% per agent (4KB brief vs 40KB full DAG)

persistenceGapQuantification.costPerIncident: Lost roadmap edits (~1KB-10KB prospective DAG state)
persistenceGapQuantification.estimatedAnnualCost: Low (design pattern prevents most loss via atomic commits)

persistencePrevention.designPattern: Atomic commits per node + roadmap protocol
persistencePrevention.recommendedEnforcement: Git hooks to warn on context-clear without DAG commit
